title: Easy Weather Forecast Dashboard

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Easy Weather Forecast Dashboard

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'><rect x='0' y='0' width='400' height='20' fill='#C06C88'/><rect x='0' y='20' width='400' height='60' fill='#B7D7CD'/><rect x='0' y='80' width='400' height='60' fill='#B7D7CD'/><rect x='0' y='140' width='400' height='20' fill='#C06C88'/><rect x='100' y='50' width='50' height='50' fill='#411C56' rx='10'/><rect x='200' y='50' width='50' height='50' fill='#411C56' rx='10'/><rect x='200' y='110' width='50' height='50' fill='#411C56' rx='10'/><text x='50' y='90' fill='white' font-size='16' font-family='Arial'>Weather</text><text x='220' y='90' fill='white' font-size='16' font-family='Arial'>Forecast</text></svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must use the specified color palette
Must include a toggle button to switch between day and night modes

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Easy Weather Forecast Dashboard

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify the functionality of the toggle button and temperature display.
Review code cleanliness and proper semantic elements.
